history:addresses_calendar_days_client_p.sql: SELECT a.state, cp.gender, m.category, cd.year, count(DISTINCT op.billing_client_ref) AS online_customers, sum(op.net_paid) AS net_paid FROM online_purchases op JOIN calendar_days cd ON op.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record JOIN clients c ON op.billing_client_ref = c.client_record JOIN client_profiles cp ON c.current_client_profile_ref = cp.client_profile_record JOIN addresses a ON c.current_address_ref = a.address_record JOIN merchandise m ON op.merchandise_ref = m.merchandise_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} AND a.state = {{string}} AND cp.gender = {{string}} AND m.category = {{string}} GROUP BY a.state, cp.gender, m.category, cd.year
history:addresses_calendar_days_client_p.template: addresses + calendar_days + client_profiles + clients + merchandise + online_purchases pattern using addresses.address_record, addresses.state, calendar_days.calendar_day_record, calendar_days.year

history:addresses_calendar_days_clients:.sql: SELECT cd.year, count(DISTINCT op.billing_client_ref) AS current_state_customers, count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ship_a.state = {{string}} THEN op.shipping_client_ref END) AS shipping_state_customers, count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN bill_a.state = {{string}} THEN op.billing_client_ref END) AS billing_state_customers FROM online_purchases op JOIN calendar_days cd ON op.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record JOIN clients c ON op.billing_client_ref = c.client_record JOIN addresses current_a ON c.current_address_ref = current_a.address_record LEFT JOIN addresses ship_a ON op.shipping_address_ref = ship_a.address_record LEFT JOIN addresses bill_a ON op.billing_address_ref = bill_a.address_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} AND current_a.state = {{string}} GROUP BY cd.year
history:addresses_calendar_days_clients:.template: addresses + calendar_days + clients + online_purchases pattern using addresses.address_record, addresses.state, calendar_days.calendar_day_record, calendar_days.year

history:addresses_clients_household_prof.sql: SELECT a.state, ir.lower_bound, ir.upper_bound, count(DISTINCT c.client_record) AS clients FROM clients c JOIN addresses a ON c.current_address_ref = a.address_record JOIN household_profiles hp ON c.current_household_profile_ref = hp.household_profile_record JOIN income_ranges ir ON hp.income_range_ref = ir.income_range_record WHERE a.state = {{string}} GROUP BY a.state, ir.lower_bound, ir.upper_bound ORDER BY clients DESC
history:addresses_clients_household_prof.template: addresses + clients + household_profiles + income_ranges pattern using addresses.address_record, addresses.state, clients.client_record, clients.current_address_ref

history:calendar_days_delivery_methods_f.sql: SELECT fc.warehouse_name, dm.carrier, sc.name AS support_center, count(DISTINCT mp.order_number) AS orders, sum(mp.net_paid_with_delivery) AS net_paid_with_delivery FROM mail_order_purchases mp JOIN fulfillment_centers fc ON mp.fulfillment_center_ref = fc.fulfillment_center_record JOIN delivery_methods dm ON mp.delivery_method_ref = dm.delivery_method_record JOIN support_centers sc ON mp.support_center_ref = sc.support_center_record JOIN calendar_days cd ON mp.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} GROUP BY fc.warehouse_name, dm.carrier, sc.name ORDER BY net_paid_with_delivery DESC LIMIT {{number}}
history:calendar_days_delivery_methods_f.template: calendar_days + delivery_methods + fulfillment_centers + mail_order_purchases + support_centers pattern using calendar_days.calendar_day_record, calendar_days.year, delivery_methods.carrier, delivery_methods.delivery_method_record

history:calendar_days_fulfillment_center.sql: SELECT fc.warehouse_name, m.category, cd.year, cd.month_of_year, sum(sl.quantity_on_hand) AS stock_on_hand FROM stock_levels sl JOIN merchandise m ON sl.merchandise_ref = m.merchandise_record JOIN calendar_days cd ON sl.calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record JOIN fulfillment_centers fc ON sl.fulfillment_center_ref = fc.fulfillment_center_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} AND cd.month_of_year = {{number}} AND m.category = {{string}} GROUP BY fc.warehouse_name, m.category, cd.year, cd.month_of_year ORDER BY stock_on_hand ASC LIMIT {{number}}
history:calendar_days_fulfillment_center.template: calendar_days + fulfillment_centers + merchandise + stock_levels pattern using calendar_days.calendar_day_record, calendar_days.month_of_year, calendar_days.year, fulfillment_centers.fulfillment_center_record

history:calendar_days_mail_order_purchas.sql: WITH channel_customers AS ( SELECT {{string}} AS channel, op.billing_client_ref AS client_ref FROM online_purchases op JOIN calendar_days cd ON op.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} UNION ALL SELECT {{string}} AS channel, mp.billing_client_ref AS client_ref FROM mail_order_purchases mp JOIN calendar_days cd ON mp.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} UNION ALL SELECT {{string}} AS channel, sp.client_ref AS client_ref FROM store_purchases sp JOIN calendar_days cd ON sp.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} ) SELECT channel, count(DISTINCT client_ref) AS customers FROM channel_customers WHERE client_ref IS NOT NULL GROUP BY channel ORDER BY customers DESC
history:calendar_days_mail_order_purchas.template: calendar_days + mail_order_purchases + online_purchases + store_purchases pattern using calendar_days.calendar_day_record, calendar_days.year, mail_order_purchases.billing_client_ref, mail_order_purchases.sale_calendar_day_ref

history:calendar_days_mail_order_refunds.sql: WITH refunds AS ( SELECT {{string}} AS channel, refunded_client_ref, merchandise_ref, return_calendar_day_ref, return_amount FROM online_refunds UNION ALL SELECT {{string}} AS channel, refunded_client_ref, merchandise_ref, return_calendar_day_ref, return_amount FROM mail_order_refunds UNION ALL SELECT {{string}} AS channel, client_ref AS refunded_client_ref, merchandise_ref, return_calendar_day_ref, return_amount FROM store_refunds ) SELECT r.channel, m.category, count(DISTINCT r.refunded_client_ref) AS refunded_customers, sum(r.return_amount) AS refund_amount FROM refunds r JOIN merchandise m ON r.merchandise_ref = m.merchandise_record JOIN calendar_days cd ON r.return_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} AND m.category = {{string}} GROUP BY r.channel, m.category ORDER BY refund_amount DESC
history:calendar_days_mail_order_refunds.template: calendar_days + mail_order_refunds + merchandise + online_refunds + store_refunds pattern using calendar_days.calendar_day_record, calendar_days.year, merchandise.category, merchandise.merchandise_record

history:calendar_days_marketing_campaign.sql: SELECT mc.campaign_name, m.category, count(DISTINCT op.billing_client_ref) AS customers, sum(op.net_paid) AS net_paid FROM online_purchases op JOIN marketing_campaigns mc ON op.campaign_ref = mc.campaign_record JOIN merchandise m ON op.merchandise_ref = m.merchandise_record JOIN calendar_days cd ON op.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} AND m.category = {{string}} GROUP BY mc.campaign_name, m.category ORDER BY customers DESC LIMIT {{number}}
history:calendar_days_marketing_campaign.template: calendar_days + marketing_campaigns + merchandise + online_purchases pattern using calendar_days.calendar_day_record, calendar_days.year, marketing_campaigns.campaign_name, marketing_campaigns.campaign_record

history:calendar_days_merchandise_online.sql: SELECT cd.year, m.category, sum(op.net_paid) AS net_paid, sum(op.net_profit) AS net_profit, sum(op.net_profit) / nullif(sum(op.net_paid), {{number}}) AS profit_margin FROM online_purchases op JOIN calendar_days cd ON op.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record JOIN merchandise m ON op.merchandise_ref = m.merchandise_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} AND m.category = {{string}} GROUP BY cd.year, m.category
history:calendar_days_merchandise_online.template: calendar_days + merchandise + online_purchases pattern using calendar_days.calendar_day_record, calendar_days.year, merchandise.category, merchandise.merchandise_record

history:calendar_days_merchandise_retail.sql: SELECT rl.state, rl.store_name, m.category, sum(sp.net_paid) AS net_paid, count(DISTINCT sp.client_ref) AS store_customers FROM store_purchases sp JOIN retail_locations rl ON sp.retail_location_ref = rl.retail_location_record JOIN merchandise m ON sp.merchandise_ref = m.merchandise_record JOIN calendar_days cd ON sp.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} AND rl.state = {{string}} AND m.category = {{string}} GROUP BY rl.state, rl.store_name, m.category ORDER BY net_paid DESC LIMIT {{number}}
history:calendar_days_merchandise_retail.template: calendar_days + merchandise + retail_locations + store_purchases pattern using calendar_days.calendar_day_record, calendar_days.year, merchandise.category, merchandise.merchandise_record

history:calendar_days_online_properties_.sql: SELECT op2.name AS online_property, sp.page_type, count(DISTINCT op.billing_client_ref) AS customers, sum(op.net_paid) AS net_paid FROM online_purchases op JOIN online_properties op2 ON op.online_property_ref = op2.online_property_record JOIN site_pages sp ON op.site_page_ref = sp.site_page_record JOIN calendar_days cd ON op.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} GROUP BY op2.name, sp.page_type ORDER BY net_paid DESC LIMIT {{number}}
history:calendar_days_online_properties_.template: calendar_days + online_properties + online_purchases + site_pages pattern using calendar_days.calendar_day_record, calendar_days.year, online_properties.name, online_properties.online_property_record

history:calendar_days_online_purchases:c.sql: WITH customer_years AS ( SELECT op.billing_client_ref, cd.year FROM online_purchases op JOIN calendar_days cd ON op.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record WHERE cd.year IN ({{number}}, {{number}}) AND op.billing_client_ref IS NOT NULL GROUP BY op.billing_client_ref, cd.year ) SELECT count(*) AS retained_online_customers FROM ( SELECT billing_client_ref FROM customer_years GROUP BY billing_client_ref HAVING count(DISTINCT year) = {{number}} ) retained
history:calendar_days_online_purchases:c.template: calendar_days + online_purchases pattern using calendar_days.calendar_day_record, calendar_days.year, online_purchases.billing_client_ref, online_purchases.sale_calendar_day_ref

nl_sql:gold_021:6737c7960d.canonical_question: Compare billing and shipping states for online Music purchases in 2001.

nl_sql:gold_021:6737c7960d.sql: SELECT ba.state AS billing_state, sa.state AS shipping_state, COUNT(*) AS purchase_rows, SUM(op.net_paid) AS net_paid FROM online_purchases op JOIN calendar_days cd ON op.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record JOIN merchandise m ON op.merchandise_ref = m.merchandise_record JOIN addresses ba ON op.billing_address_ref = ba.address_record JOIN addresses sa ON op.shipping_address_ref = sa.address_record WHERE m.category = {{string}} AND cd.year = {{number}} GROUP BY ba.state, sa.state

nl_sql:gold_025:0578adf9d4.canonical_question: How many online purchases in 2001 shipped to a different customer than billed for billing state TX?
nl_sql:gold_025:0578adf9d4.source_notes: Same client table joined for billing and shipping roles.
nl_sql:gold_025:0578adf9d4.sql: SELECT a.state, cd.year, COUNT(*) AS purchase_rows FROM online_purchases op JOIN calendar_days cd ON op.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record JOIN addresses a ON op.billing_address_ref = a.address_record JOIN clients bill_c ON op.billing_client_ref = bill_c.client_record JOIN clients ship_c ON op.shipping_client_ref = ship_c.client_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} AND a.state = {{string}} AND bill_c.client_record <> ship_c.client_record GROUP BY a.state, cd.year

nl_sql:gold_041:63f764d5f6.canonical_question: Which Unknown campaigns drove online Music net paid sales in 2001?
nl_sql:gold_041:63f764d5f6.sql: SELECT mc.purpose, mc.campaign_name, m.category, cd.year, SUM(op.net_paid) AS net_paid FROM online_purchases op JOIN calendar_days cd ON op.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record JOIN marketing_campaigns mc ON op.campaign_ref = mc.campaign_record JOIN merchandise m ON op.merchandise_ref = m.merchandise_record WHERE mc.purpose = {{string}} AND m.category = {{string}} AND cd.year = {{number}} GROUP BY mc.purpose, mc.campaign_name, m.category, cd.year

nl_sql:gold_045:01f7aa30f5.sql: SELECT mc.purpose, mc.discount_active, COUNT(*) AS campaigns, SUM(mc.cost) AS total_cost, SUM(mc.response_target) AS response_target, SUM(CASE WHEN mc.channel_email = {{string}} THEN {{number}} ELSE {{number}} END) AS email_campaigns, SUM(CASE WHEN mc.channel_tv = {{string}} THEN {{number}} ELSE {{number}} END) AS tv_campaigns, SUM(CASE WHEN mc.channel_radio = {{string}} THEN {{number}} ELSE {{number}} END) AS radio_campaigns FROM marketing_campaigns mc WHERE mc.purpose = {{string}} AND mc.discount_active = {{string}} GROUP BY mc.purpose, mc.discount_active

nl_sql:gold_049:f929455a59.canonical_question: Campaign duration and target response for Unknown campaigns starting in 2001.
nl_sql:gold_049:f929455a59.source_notes: Campaign start and end date roles.
nl_sql:gold_049:f929455a59.sql: SELECT mc.purpose, start_day.year, AVG(end_day.calendar_day_record - start_day.calendar_day_record) AS avg_duration_days, SUM(mc.response_target) AS response_target FROM marketing_campaigns mc JOIN calendar_days start_day ON mc.start_calendar_day_ref = start_day.calendar_day_record JOIN calendar_days end_day ON mc.end_calendar_day_ref = end_day.calendar_day_record WHERE mc.purpose = {{string}} AND start_day.year = {{number}} GROUP BY mc.purpose, start_day.year

nl_sql:gold_109:9dcfee7849.canonical_question: Positive stock for Music at warehouse Conventional childr during month 1 of 2001.
nl_sql:gold_109:9dcfee7849.source_notes: Inventory stock by warehouse and item.
nl_sql:gold_109:9dcfee7849.sql: SELECT fc.warehouse_name, m.category, cd.year, cd.month_of_year, SUM(sl.quantity_on_hand) AS quantity_on_hand FROM stock_levels sl JOIN calendar_days cd ON sl.calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record JOIN fulfillment_centers fc ON sl.fulfillment_center_ref = fc.fulfillment_center_record JOIN merchandise m ON sl.merchandise_ref = m.merchandise_record WHERE fc.warehouse_name = {{string}} AND m.category = {{string}} AND cd.year = {{number}} AND cd.month_of_year = {{number}} AND sl.quantity_on_hand > {{number}} GROUP BY fc.warehouse_name, m.category, cd.year, cd.month_of_year

nl_sql:gold_113:377bad24bb.sql: SELECT fc.warehouse_name, m.category, cd.year, SUM(op.quantity) AS online_units, SUM(sl.quantity_on_hand) AS stock_units FROM online_purchases op JOIN calendar_days cd ON op.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record JOIN merchandise m ON op.merchandise_ref = m.merchandise_record JOIN fulfillment_centers fc ON op.fulfillment_center_ref = fc.fulfillment_center_record JOIN stock_levels sl ON sl.calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record AND sl.merchandise_ref = m.merchandise_record AND sl.fulfillment_center_ref = fc.fulfillment_center_record WHERE fc.warehouse_name = {{string}} AND m.category = {{string}} AND cd.year = {{number}} GROUP BY fc.warehouse_name, m.category, cd.year

nl_sql:history_005:9c76a24f65.canonical_question: Count current M customers from TX whose first sale year is 2001.
nl_sql:history_005:9c76a24f65.sql: SELECT cp.gender, a.state, cd.year, COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_record) AS customers FROM clients c JOIN client_profiles cp ON c.current_client_profile_ref = cp.client_profile_record JOIN addresses a ON c.current_address_ref = a.address_record JOIN calendar_days cd ON c.first_sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record WHERE cp.gender = {{string}} AND a.state = {{string}} AND cd.year = {{number}} GROUP BY cp.gender, a.state, cd.year

nl_sql:history_055:6a5e04167d.canonical_question: Compare billing and shipping states for online Shoes purchases in 2001.

nl_sql:history_055:6a5e04167d.sql: SELECT ba.state AS billing_state, sa.state AS shipping_state, COUNT(*) AS purchase_rows, SUM(op.net_paid) AS net_paid FROM online_purchases op JOIN calendar_days cd ON op.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record JOIN merchandise m ON op.merchandise_ref = m.merchandise_record JOIN addresses ba ON op.billing_address_ref = ba.address_record JOIN addresses sa ON op.shipping_address_ref = sa.address_record WHERE m.category = {{string}} AND cd.year = {{number}} GROUP BY ba.state, sa.state

nl_sql:history_065:b8de7ed978.source_notes: Same client table joined for billing and shipping roles.
nl_sql:history_065:b8de7ed978.sql: SELECT a.state, cd.year, COUNT(*) AS purchase_rows FROM online_purchases op JOIN calendar_days cd ON op.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record JOIN addresses a ON op.billing_address_ref = a.address_record JOIN clients bill_c ON op.billing_client_ref = bill_c.client_record JOIN clients ship_c ON op.shipping_client_ref = ship_c.client_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} AND a.state = {{string}} AND bill_c.client_record <> ship_c.client_record GROUP BY a.state, cd.year

nl_sql:history_105:51b42f6ecb.canonical_question: Which Unknown campaigns drove online Shoes net paid sales in 2001?
nl_sql:history_105:51b42f6ecb.sql: SELECT mc.purpose, mc.campaign_name, m.category, cd.year, SUM(op.net_paid) AS net_paid FROM online_purchases op JOIN calendar_days cd ON op.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record JOIN marketing_campaigns mc ON op.campaign_ref = mc.campaign_record JOIN merchandise m ON op.merchandise_ref = m.merchandise_record WHERE mc.purpose = {{string}} AND m.category = {{string}} AND cd.year = {{number}} GROUP BY mc.purpose, mc.campaign_name, m.category, cd.year

pattern:history:addresses_calendar_days_.canonical_question: Analyze address_record, state, calendar_day_record, year using addresses, calendar_days, client_profiles, clients.
paraphrases: Use the observed addresses and calendar_days and client_profiles query pattern.
pattern:history:addresses_calendar_days_.sql_template: SELECT a.state, cp.gender, m.category, cd.year, count(DISTINCT op.billing_client_ref) AS online_customers, sum(op.net_paid) AS net_paid FROM online_purchases op JOIN calendar_days cd ON op.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record JOIN clients c ON op.billing_client_ref = c.client_record JOIN client_profiles cp ON c.current_client_profile_ref = cp.client_profile_record JOIN addresses a ON c.current_address_ref = a.address_record JOIN merchandise m ON op.merchandise_ref = m.merchandise_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} AND a.state = {{string}} AND cp.gender = {{string}} AND m.category = {{string}} GROUP BY a.state, cp.gender, m.category, cd.year
pattern:history:addresses_calendar_days_.summary: addresses + calendar_days + client_profiles + clients + merchandise + online_purchases pattern using addresses.address_record, addresses.state, calendar_days.calendar_day_record, calendar_days.year

pattern:history:addresses_calendar_days_.canonical_question: Analyze address_record, state, calendar_day_record, year using addresses, calendar_days, clients, online_purchases.
paraphrases: Use the observed addresses and calendar_days and clients query pattern.
pattern:history:addresses_calendar_days_.sql_template: SELECT cd.year, count(DISTINCT op.billing_client_ref) AS current_state_customers, count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ship_a.state = {{string}} THEN op.shipping_client_ref END) AS shipping_state_customers, count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN bill_a.state = {{string}} THEN op.billing_client_ref END) AS billing_state_customers FROM online_purchases op JOIN calendar_days cd ON op.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record JOIN clients c ON op.billing_client_ref = c.client_record JOIN addresses current_a ON c.current_address_ref = current_a.address_record LEFT JOIN addresses ship_a ON op.shipping_address_ref = ship_a.address_record LEFT JOIN addresses bill_a ON op.billing_address_ref = bill_a.address_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} AND current_a.state = {{string}} GROUP BY cd.year
pattern:history:addresses_calendar_days_.summary: addresses + calendar_days + clients + online_purchases pattern using addresses.address_record, addresses.state, calendar_days.calendar_day_record, calendar_days.year

pattern:history:addresses_clients_househ.canonical_question: Analyze address_record, state, client_record, current_address_ref using addresses, clients, household_profiles, income_ranges.
paraphrases: Use the observed addresses and clients and household_profiles query pattern.
pattern:history:addresses_clients_househ.sql_template: SELECT a.state, ir.lower_bound, ir.upper_bound, count(DISTINCT c.client_record) AS clients FROM clients c JOIN addresses a ON c.current_address_ref = a.address_record JOIN household_profiles hp ON c.current_household_profile_ref = hp.household_profile_record JOIN income_ranges ir ON hp.income_range_ref = ir.income_range_record WHERE a.state = {{string}} GROUP BY a.state, ir.lower_bound, ir.upper_bound ORDER BY clients DESC
pattern:history:addresses_clients_househ.summary: addresses + clients + household_profiles + income_ranges pattern using addresses.address_record, addresses.state, clients.client_record, clients.current_address_ref

pattern:history:calendar_days_delivery_m.canonical_question: Analyze calendar_day_record, year, carrier, delivery_method_record using calendar_days, delivery_methods, fulfillment_centers, mail_order_purchases.
paraphrases: Use the observed calendar_days and delivery_methods and fulfillment_centers query pattern.
pattern:history:calendar_days_delivery_m.sql_template: SELECT fc.warehouse_name, dm.carrier, sc.name AS support_center, count(DISTINCT mp.order_number) AS orders, sum(mp.net_paid_with_delivery) AS net_paid_with_delivery FROM mail_order_purchases mp JOIN fulfillment_centers fc ON mp.fulfillment_center_ref = fc.fulfillment_center_record JOIN delivery_methods dm ON mp.delivery_method_ref = dm.delivery_method_record JOIN support_centers sc ON mp.support_center_ref = sc.support_center_record JOIN calendar_days cd ON mp.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} GROUP BY fc.warehouse_name, dm.carrier, sc.name ORDER BY net_paid_with_delivery DESC LIMIT {{number}}
pattern:history:calendar_days_delivery_m.summary: calendar_days + delivery_methods + fulfillment_centers + mail_order_purchases + support_centers pattern using calendar_days.calendar_day_record, calendar_days.year, delivery_methods.carrier, delivery_methods.delivery_method_record

pattern:history:calendar_days_fulfillmen.canonical_question: Analyze calendar_day_record, month_of_year, year, fulfillment_center_record using calendar_days, fulfillment_centers, merchandise, stock_levels.
paraphrases: Use the observed calendar_days and fulfillment_centers and merchandise query pattern.
pattern:history:calendar_days_fulfillmen.sql_template: SELECT fc.warehouse_name, m.category, cd.year, cd.month_of_year, sum(sl.quantity_on_hand) AS stock_on_hand FROM stock_levels sl JOIN merchandise m ON sl.merchandise_ref = m.merchandise_record JOIN calendar_days cd ON sl.calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record JOIN fulfillment_centers fc ON sl.fulfillment_center_ref = fc.fulfillment_center_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} AND cd.month_of_year = {{number}} AND m.category = {{string}} GROUP BY fc.warehouse_name, m.category, cd.year, cd.month_of_year ORDER BY stock_on_hand ASC LIMIT {{number}}
pattern:history:calendar_days_fulfillmen.summary: calendar_days + fulfillment_centers + merchandise + stock_levels pattern using calendar_days.calendar_day_record, calendar_days.month_of_year, calendar_days.year, fulfillment_centers.fulfillment_center_record

pattern:history:calendar_days_mail_order.canonical_question: Analyze calendar_day_record, year, billing_client_ref, sale_calendar_day_ref using calendar_days, mail_order_purchases, online_purchases, store_purchases.
paraphrases: Use the observed calendar_days and mail_order_purchases and online_purchases query pattern.
pattern:history:calendar_days_mail_order.sql_template: WITH channel_customers AS ( SELECT {{string}} AS channel, op.billing_client_ref AS client_ref FROM online_purchases op JOIN calendar_days cd ON op.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} UNION ALL SELECT {{string}} AS channel, mp.billing_client_ref AS client_ref FROM mail_order_purchases mp JOIN calendar_days cd ON mp.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} UNION ALL SELECT {{string}} AS channel, sp.client_ref AS client_ref FROM store_purchases sp JOIN calendar_days cd ON sp.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} ) SELECT channel, count(DISTINCT client_ref) AS customers FROM channel_customers WHERE client_ref IS NOT NULL GROUP BY channel ORDER BY customers DESC
pattern:history:calendar_days_mail_order.summary: calendar_days + mail_order_purchases + online_purchases + store_purchases pattern using calendar_days.calendar_day_record, calendar_days.year, mail_order_purchases.billing_client_ref, mail_order_purchases.sale_calendar_day_ref

pattern:history:calendar_days_mail_order.canonical_question: Analyze calendar_day_record, year, category, merchandise_record using calendar_days, mail_order_refunds, merchandise, online_refunds.
paraphrases: Use the observed calendar_days and mail_order_refunds and merchandise query pattern.
pattern:history:calendar_days_mail_order.sql_template: WITH refunds AS ( SELECT {{string}} AS channel, refunded_client_ref, merchandise_ref, return_calendar_day_ref, return_amount FROM online_refunds UNION ALL SELECT {{string}} AS channel, refunded_client_ref, merchandise_ref, return_calendar_day_ref, return_amount FROM mail_order_refunds UNION ALL SELECT {{string}} AS channel, client_ref AS refunded_client_ref, merchandise_ref, return_calendar_day_ref, return_amount FROM store_refunds ) SELECT r.channel, m.category, count(DISTINCT r.refunded_client_ref) AS refunded_customers, sum(r.return_amount) AS refund_amount FROM refunds r JOIN merchandise m ON r.merchandise_ref = m.merchandise_record JOIN calendar_days cd ON r.return_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} AND m.category = {{string}} GROUP BY r.channel, m.category ORDER BY refund_amount DESC
pattern:history:calendar_days_mail_order.summary: calendar_days + mail_order_refunds + merchandise + online_refunds + store_refunds pattern using calendar_days.calendar_day_record, calendar_days.year, merchandise.category, merchandise.merchandise_record

pattern:history:calendar_days_marketing_.canonical_question: Analyze calendar_day_record, year, campaign_name, campaign_record using calendar_days, marketing_campaigns, merchandise, online_purchases.
paraphrases: Use the observed calendar_days and marketing_campaigns and merchandise query pattern.
pattern:history:calendar_days_marketing_.sql_template: SELECT mc.campaign_name, m.category, count(DISTINCT op.billing_client_ref) AS customers, sum(op.net_paid) AS net_paid FROM online_purchases op JOIN marketing_campaigns mc ON op.campaign_ref = mc.campaign_record JOIN merchandise m ON op.merchandise_ref = m.merchandise_record JOIN calendar_days cd ON op.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} AND m.category = {{string}} GROUP BY mc.campaign_name, m.category ORDER BY customers DESC LIMIT {{number}}
pattern:history:calendar_days_marketing_.summary: calendar_days + marketing_campaigns + merchandise + online_purchases pattern using calendar_days.calendar_day_record, calendar_days.year, marketing_campaigns.campaign_name, marketing_campaigns.campaign_record

pattern:history:calendar_days_merchandis.canonical_question: Analyze calendar_day_record, year, category, merchandise_record using calendar_days, merchandise, online_purchases.
paraphrases: Use the observed calendar_days and merchandise and online_purchases query pattern.
pattern:history:calendar_days_merchandis.sql_template: SELECT cd.year, m.category, sum(op.net_paid) AS net_paid, sum(op.net_profit) AS net_profit, sum(op.net_profit) / nullif(sum(op.net_paid), {{number}}) AS profit_margin FROM online_purchases op JOIN calendar_days cd ON op.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record JOIN merchandise m ON op.merchandise_ref = m.merchandise_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} AND m.category = {{string}} GROUP BY cd.year, m.category
pattern:history:calendar_days_merchandis.summary: calendar_days + merchandise + online_purchases pattern using calendar_days.calendar_day_record, calendar_days.year, merchandise.category, merchandise.merchandise_record

pattern:history:calendar_days_merchandis.canonical_question: Analyze calendar_day_record, year, category, merchandise_record using calendar_days, merchandise, retail_locations, store_purchases.
paraphrases: Use the observed calendar_days and merchandise and retail_locations query pattern.
pattern:history:calendar_days_merchandis.sql_template: SELECT rl.state, rl.store_name, m.category, sum(sp.net_paid) AS net_paid, count(DISTINCT sp.client_ref) AS store_customers FROM store_purchases sp JOIN retail_locations rl ON sp.retail_location_ref = rl.retail_location_record JOIN merchandise m ON sp.merchandise_ref = m.merchandise_record JOIN calendar_days cd ON sp.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} AND rl.state = {{string}} AND m.category = {{string}} GROUP BY rl.state, rl.store_name, m.category ORDER BY net_paid DESC LIMIT {{number}}
pattern:history:calendar_days_merchandis.summary: calendar_days + merchandise + retail_locations + store_purchases pattern using calendar_days.calendar_day_record, calendar_days.year, merchandise.category, merchandise.merchandise_record

pattern:history:calendar_days_online_pro.canonical_question: Analyze calendar_day_record, year, name, online_property_record using calendar_days, online_properties, online_purchases, site_pages.
paraphrases: Use the observed calendar_days and online_properties and online_purchases query pattern.
pattern:history:calendar_days_online_pro.sql_template: SELECT op2.name AS online_property, sp.page_type, count(DISTINCT op.billing_client_ref) AS customers, sum(op.net_paid) AS net_paid FROM online_purchases op JOIN online_properties op2 ON op.online_property_ref = op2.online_property_record JOIN site_pages sp ON op.site_page_ref = sp.site_page_record JOIN calendar_days cd ON op.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} GROUP BY op2.name, sp.page_type ORDER BY net_paid DESC LIMIT {{number}}
pattern:history:calendar_days_online_pro.summary: calendar_days + online_properties + online_purchases + site_pages pattern using calendar_days.calendar_day_record, calendar_days.year, online_properties.name, online_properties.online_property_record

pattern:history:calendar_days_online_pur.canonical_question: Analyze calendar_day_record, year, billing_client_ref, sale_calendar_day_ref using calendar_days, online_purchases.
paraphrases: Use the observed calendar_days and online_purchases query pattern.
pattern:history:calendar_days_online_pur.sql_template: WITH customer_years AS ( SELECT op.billing_client_ref, cd.year FROM online_purchases op JOIN calendar_days cd ON op.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record WHERE cd.year IN ({{number}}, {{number}}) AND op.billing_client_ref IS NOT NULL GROUP BY op.billing_client_ref, cd.year ) SELECT count(*) AS retained_online_customers FROM ( SELECT billing_client_ref FROM customer_years GROUP BY billing_client_ref HAVING count(DISTINCT year) = {{number}} ) retained
pattern:history:calendar_days_online_pur.summary: calendar_days + online_purchases pattern using calendar_days.calendar_day_record, calendar_days.year, online_purchases.billing_client_ref, online_purchases.sale_calendar_day_ref

pattern:nl_sql:gold_001:7545a7a15c.canonical_question: Count current F customers from TX whose first sale year is 2001.
paraphrases: Use the observed addresses and calendar_days and client_profiles query pattern.
pattern:nl_sql:gold_001:7545a7a15c.sql_template: SELECT cp.gender, a.state, cd.year, COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_record) AS customers FROM clients c JOIN client_profiles cp ON c.current_client_profile_ref = cp.client_profile_record JOIN addresses a ON c.current_address_ref = a.address_record JOIN calendar_days cd ON c.first_sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record WHERE cp.gender = {{string}} AND a.state = {{string}} AND cd.year = {{number}} GROUP BY cp.gender, a.state, cd.year

pattern:nl_sql:gold_021:6737c7960d.canonical_question: Compare billing and shipping states for online Music purchases in 2001.
paraphrases: Use the observed addresses and calendar_days and merchandise query pattern.
pattern:nl_sql:gold_021:6737c7960d.sql_template: SELECT ba.state AS billing_state, sa.state AS shipping_state, COUNT(*) AS purchase_rows, SUM(op.net_paid) AS net_paid FROM online_purchases op JOIN calendar_days cd ON op.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record JOIN merchandise m ON op.merchandise_ref = m.merchandise_record JOIN addresses ba ON op.billing_address_ref = ba.address_record JOIN addresses sa ON op.shipping_address_ref = sa.address_record WHERE m.category = {{string}} AND cd.year = {{number}} GROUP BY ba.state, sa.state

pattern:nl_sql:gold_025:0578adf9d4.canonical_question: How many online purchases in 2001 shipped to a different customer than billed for billing state TX?

pattern:nl_sql:gold_025:0578adf9d4.sql_template: SELECT a.state, cd.year, COUNT(*) AS purchase_rows FROM online_purchases op JOIN calendar_days cd ON op.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record JOIN addresses a ON op.billing_address_ref = a.address_record JOIN clients bill_c ON op.billing_client_ref = bill_c.client_record JOIN clients ship_c ON op.shipping_client_ref = ship_c.client_record WHERE cd.year = {{number}} AND a.state = {{string}} AND bill_c.client_record <> ship_c.client_record GROUP BY a.state, cd.year

pattern:nl_sql:gold_101:207d8fc41b.sql_template: SELECT ml.department, ml.type, start_day.year, COUNT(*) AS pages FROM mailer_pages ml JOIN calendar_days start_day ON ml.start_calendar_day_ref = start_day.calendar_day_record JOIN calendar_days end_day ON ml.end_calendar_day_ref = end_day.calendar_day_record WHERE ml.department = {{string}} AND ml.type = {{string}} AND start_day.year = {{number}} GROUP BY ml.department, ml.type, start_day.year

pattern:nl_sql:gold_105:d22741a474.canonical_question: Mail order refunds with reason reason 31 by carrier AIRBORNE in 2001.
paraphrases: Use the observed calendar_days and delivery_methods and mail_order_refunds query pattern.
pattern:nl_sql:gold_105:d22741a474.sql_template: SELECT rr.reason_description, dm.carrier, cd.year, SUM(mr.return_amount) AS return_amount FROM mail_order_refunds mr JOIN calendar_days cd ON mr.return_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record JOIN return_reasons rr ON mr.return_reason_ref = rr.return_reason_record JOIN delivery_methods dm ON mr.delivery_method_ref = dm.delivery_method_record WHERE rr.reason_description = {{string}} AND dm.carrier = {{string}} AND cd.year = {{number}} GROUP BY rr.reason_description, dm.carrier, cd.year

pattern:nl_sql:gold_109:9dcfee7849.canonical_question: Positive stock for Music at warehouse Conventional childr during month 1 of 2001.

pattern:nl_sql:gold_109:9dcfee7849.sql_template: SELECT fc.warehouse_name, m.category, cd.year, cd.month_of_year, SUM(sl.quantity_on_hand) AS quantity_on_hand FROM stock_levels sl JOIN calendar_days cd ON sl.calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record JOIN fulfillment_centers fc ON sl.fulfillment_center_ref = fc.fulfillment_center_record JOIN merchandise m ON sl.merchandise_ref = m.merchandise_record WHERE fc.warehouse_name = {{string}} AND m.category = {{string}} AND cd.year = {{number}} AND cd.month_of_year = {{number}} AND sl.quantity_on_hand > {{number}} GROUP BY fc.warehouse_name, m.category, cd.year, cd.month_of_year

pattern:nl_sql:gold_113:377bad24bb.canonical_question: Compare online demand and stock for Music at warehouse Conventional childr in 2001.
paraphrases: Use the observed calendar_days and fulfillment_centers and merchandise query pattern.
pattern:nl_sql:gold_113:377bad24bb.sql_template: SELECT fc.warehouse_name, m.category, cd.year, SUM(op.quantity) AS online_units, SUM(sl.quantity_on_hand) AS stock_units FROM online_purchases op JOIN calendar_days cd ON op.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record JOIN merchandise m ON op.merchandise_ref = m.merchandise_record JOIN fulfillment_centers fc ON op.fulfillment_center_ref = fc.fulfillment_center_record JOIN stock_levels sl ON sl.calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record AND sl.merchandise_ref = m.merchandise_record AND sl.fulfillment_center_ref = fc.fulfillment_center_record WHERE fc.warehouse_name = {{string}} AND m.category = {{string}} AND cd.year = {{number}} GROUP BY fc.warehouse_name, m.category, cd.year

pattern:nl_sql:history_005:9c76a24f65.canonical_question: Count current M customers from TX whose first sale year is 2001.
paraphrases: Use the observed addresses and calendar_days and client_profiles query pattern.
pattern:nl_sql:history_005:9c76a24f65.sql_template: SELECT cp.gender, a.state, cd.year, COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_record) AS customers FROM clients c JOIN client_profiles cp ON c.current_client_profile_ref = cp.client_profile_record JOIN addresses a ON c.current_address_ref = a.address_record JOIN calendar_days cd ON c.first_sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record WHERE cp.gender = {{string}} AND a.state = {{string}} AND cd.year = {{number}} GROUP BY cp.gender, a.state, cd.year

pattern:nl_sql:history_030:7c32402ad3.sql_template: SELECT cp.education_status, cp.credit_rating, hp.buy_potential, ir.lower_bound, ir.upper_bound, COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_record) AS customers FROM clients c JOIN client_profiles cp ON c.current_client_profile_ref = cp.client_profile_record JOIN household_profiles hp ON c.current_household_profile_ref = hp.household_profile_record JOIN income_ranges ir ON hp.income_range_ref = ir.income_range_record WHERE cp.education_status = {{string}} AND cp.credit_rating = {{string}} AND hp.buy_potential = {{string}} GROUP BY cp.education_status, cp.credit_rating, hp.buy_potential, ir.lower_bound, ir.upper_bound

pattern:nl_sql:history_035:54318e2ac7.canonical_question: How many F online shoppers from TX bought Shoes in 2001?

pattern:nl_sql:history_035:54318e2ac7.sql_template: SELECT a.state, cp.gender, m.category, cd.year, COUNT(DISTINCT op.billing_client_ref) AS customers FROM online_purchases op JOIN calendar_days cd ON op.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record JOIN merchandise m ON op.merchandise_ref = m.merchandise_record JOIN addresses a ON op.billing_address_ref = a.address_record JOIN client_profiles cp ON op.billing_client_profile_ref = cp.client_profile_record WHERE a.state = {{string}} AND cp.gender = {{string}} AND m.category = {{string}} AND cd.year = {{number}} GROUP BY a.state, cp.gender, m.category, cd.year

pattern:nl_sql:history_170:8906ca5a1b.sql_template: SELECT ct.shift, rl.state, cd.year, SUM(sp.net_paid) AS net_paid, COUNT(*) AS rows FROM store_purchases sp JOIN clock_times ct ON sp.sale_clock_time_ref = ct.clock_time_record JOIN calendar_days cd ON sp.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record JOIN retail_locations rl ON sp.retail_location_ref = rl.retail_location_record WHERE ct.shift = {{string}} AND rl.state = {{string}} AND cd.year = {{number}} GROUP BY ct.shift, rl.state, cd.year

pattern:nl_sql:history_175:b82bd749e7.canonical_question: Store refund amount for Shoes products with return reason reason 31 in 2001.

pattern:nl_sql:history_215:b38736188e.canonical_question: Mail order net paid with delivery for support center Mid Atlantic and carrier AIRBORNE in 2001.

pattern:nl_sql:history_286:3dceab47d0.canonical_question: Compare online demand and stock for Shoes at warehouse Conventional childr in 2002.
paraphrases: Use the observed calendar_days and fulfillment_centers and merchandise query pattern.
pattern:nl_sql:history_286:3dceab47d0.sql_template: SELECT fc.warehouse_name, m.category, cd.year, SUM(op.quantity) AS online_units, SUM(sl.quantity_on_hand) AS stock_units FROM online_purchases op JOIN calendar_days cd ON op.sale_calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record JOIN merchandise m ON op.merchandise_ref = m.merchandise_record JOIN fulfillment_centers fc ON op.fulfillment_center_ref = fc.fulfillment_center_record JOIN stock_levels sl ON sl.calendar_day_ref = cd.calendar_day_record AND sl.merchandise_ref = m.merchandise_record AND sl.fulfillment_center_ref = fc.fulfillment_center_record WHERE fc.warehouse_name = {{string}} AND m.category = {{string}} AND cd.year = {{number}} GROUP BY fc.warehouse_name, m.category, cd.year

pattern:nl_sql:history_295:b13e0b9fd1.canonical_question: Summarize merchandise for brand edu packscholar #1, color turquoise, and size petite.
paraphrases: Use the observed merchandise query pattern.
pattern:nl_sql:history_295:b13e0b9fd1.sql_template: SELECT m.brand, m.color, m.size, m.category, m.class, m.manufacturer, AVG(m.current_price) AS avg_current_price, AVG(m.wholesale_cost) AS avg_wholesale_cost, COUNT(*) AS products FROM merchandise m WHERE m.brand = {{string}} AND m.color = {{string}} AND m.size = {{string}} GROUP BY m.brand, m.color, m.size, m.category, m.class, m.manufacturer
